rules.name: reading
rules.pattern: I('m| am|'ve been| was) reading|\b(just finished a book|reading a (book|novel)|picked up a book|put down the book)\b

rules.name: writing
rules.pattern: I('m| am|'ve been| was) writing|\b(working on a (draft|chapter|scene)|word count|stuck on the (scene|chapter|draft))\b
responses: What have you got so far?
What part is giving you trouble?

rules.name: running
rules.pattern: \b(went for a (run|walk|jog)|I (ran|jogged) (today|this morning|this evening|yesterday)|morning (run|walk)|hit the gym|worked out|did a workout)\b

rules.name: gaming
rules.pattern: \b(video game|playing a game|boss fight|game over|leveled up|respawn|I('m| am) (playing|gaming))\b
